_source: arXiv:2411.04997 Table 2, ViT-L/14@336px section (verified via WebFetch)

llm2clip_15m_336._caveat: Trained on DreamLIP-recaptioned CC3M+CC12M (~15M pairs) at 336px -- more data than our runs use. No published 336px+CC3M-only (3M) row exists in the paper (3M is only reported at 224px). Cited here as the closest available reference, not a controlled baseline.
